summary: U5.1 R2: F19 LLM circuit breaker + LLM_DISABLED kill switch wired into /api/mentor-table; F20 git-history audit clean (no rotation needed); F21 LTAI redaction pattern + tests; F22 stripControlChars rename with back-compat aliases; F23 Vercel XFF trust-boundary doc; F24 HSTS preload commitment; F25 Permissions-Policy expanded to 12 features; F26 dist/ verified by secret value (not just env name); F27 SRI deferred with rationale. docs/SECURITY.md created.

notes.warning: F19 residual risk: distributed-IP attack capped at instance_count * LLM_HOURLY_BUDGET. Operator must trigger LLM_DISABLED=1 within minutes if abuse fires. Upgrade path to Upstash global counter is documented in docs/SECURITY.md but deferred for KISS.
notes.suggestion: F27 SRI deferred — same-origin asset model + CSP script-src 'self' already cover supply-chain threat for current architecture. Revisit if any 3rd-party CDN is added.

verifyGate.f20Audit: git history clean — dist/ never committed
